---
title: "Research Workflows"
subtitle: "Day 2 - Block 5"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D2 B5"
    scrollable: true
    bibliography:
      - ../../../resources/workshop-citations.bib
      - ../../assets/references.bib
    embed-resources: true
---

## Workflow first [^s1]

- Research needs repeatable systems
- Not just better prompts
- Team reliability beats solo speed

```{=html}
<div style="border:1px dashed #999; padding:0.7em; background:#fafafa; font-size:0.8em; margin-top:0.6em;">
<strong>PLACEHOLDER:</strong> add one visual for "solo vs team workflow"<br>
<code>slides/assets/placeholders/d2b5_workflow_compare.png</code>
</div>
```

## Issue -> PR loop [^s2]

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  I[GitHub issue] --> A[Agent branch work]
  A --> T[Tests and evidence]
  T --> P[Pull request]
  P --> H[Human review]
  H --> M[Merge or changes requested]
```

- Issue defines intent
- PR shows diff and evidence
- Review is mandatory gate

## Using Github

Embrace the role of an architect

1) Write Github Issues
2) Hand Issue to an AI agent
3) Review their proposal (Pull request)

> This is integrated with Github; Hence save!

## An Issue

```md
Title: Add verification checklist to E6 page

Why
- Groups skip verification notes
- Review discussion gets uneven

Done when
- E6 page shows 3-step checklist
- rubric mentions verification note
- page builds without errors
```

## Create issue with `gh`

```bash
gh issue create \
  --title "Add verification checklist to E6 page" \
  --body-file issue.md
```

## Fresh session handoff

```text
Read GitHub issue #17 in this repo.
Create a branch, implement the change,
run relevant checks, and open a PR.
Use the issue as the source of truth.
```

## Handoff loop demo

```{=html}
<video controls preload="metadata" style="width:100%; max-height:72vh; border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:8px; background:#000;">
  <source src="../../assets/videos/d2b5_hl.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  Your browser does not support the video tag.
</video>
```

## {background-video-loop="../../assets/videos/pr.mp4"}



## {background-video-loop="../../assets/videos/hl.mp4"}


## Voice capture

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; font-size:0.83em;">
  <div style="border:2px solid #1f4b99; border-radius:8px; padding:0.7em; background:#f3f7ff;">
    <strong>Option A</strong><br>
    handy.computer for dictation
  </div>
  <div style="border:2px solid #995c1f; border-radius:8px; padding:0.7em; background:#fff8f0;">
    <strong>Option B</strong><br>
    aquavoice.com for dictation
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top:0.7em; border:1px dashed #999; padding:0.7em; background:#fafafa; font-size:0.8em;">
<strong>PLACEHOLDER:</strong> add website screenshots and one transcript clip<br>
<code>slides/assets/placeholders/d2b5_handy.png</code><br>
<code>slides/assets/placeholders/d2b5_aquavoice.png</code><br>
<code>slides/assets/placeholders/d2b5_voice_raw.txt</code>
</div>
```

## Transcript -> notes [^s3]

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  V[Voice transcript] --> L[LLM post-process prompt]
  L --> N[Structured notes]
  N --> I[Issue drafts]
  N --> R[Rubric feedback]
```

- Keep raw transcript attached
- Add confidence and uncertainty
- Human checks before sending

## Feedback example

```text
Raw voice: "Group 3 has a clear idea, but identification is weak. Add robustness and cite one contrary result."

Post-processed note:
- Strength: clear research question
- Gap: weak identification strategy
- Action 1: add one robustness check
- Action 2: add one contradictory source
- Priority: high
```

```{=html}
<div style="border:1px dashed #999; padding:0.6em; background:#fafafa; font-size:0.8em; margin-top:0.5em;">
<strong>PLACEHOLDER:</strong> add assignment feedback screenshot<br>
<code>slides/assets/placeholders/d2b5_feedback_note.png</code>
</div>
```

## Team safety rules [^s4]

- No merge without review
- Require test evidence in PR
- Keep rollback instructions ready

```{=html}
<div style="margin-top:0.6em; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:8px; padding:0.7em; background:#f8fbff; font-size:0.82em;">
<strong>Policy prompt:</strong> Where is human review mandatory in your workflow?
</div>
```

## Runbook output [^s5]

- Terminal layout and roles
- Voice-to-notes protocol
- Issue and PR checklist

## PR checklist

- Link issue in PR body
- Include test evidence
- State human review gate

```{=html}
<div style="font-size:0.65em; opacity:0.85; margin-top:0.8em;">
[^s1]: Sources: @nber:2024; @stremersch2024how<br>
[^s2]: Sources: @willisonAgenticPatterns; @opencodeDocs; @yao2022react<br>
[^s3]: Sources: @anthropicContextEngineering2025; @blanchardNewToolsNew2025; @ragSkillMcpRlm<br>
[^s4]: Sources: @willisonAgenticPatterns; @metr:2025<br>
[^s5]: Sources: @opencodeDocs; @stremersch2024how
</div>
```

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
